description: Style NoteA practical and stylish solution to managing your monetary essentials, this wallet from fiorelli is the perfect accessory for all your outfits. Handcrafted from premium leather, this piece is specially designed and created with the highest quality standards, ensuring that it will last for several years. Its classic styling and minimalistic detailing offers unbeatable understated style.nbsp; Product DetailsBlack wallet with two press buttoned tab and metal brand badge Seven credit card slots and two slip pockets on the flapSix credit card slots, a slip pocket, one main compartment with zippered inner separator on the other sideGuarantee: 1yrMaterials and CareLeatherWipe with damp cloth to remove dust SizeDimensions: 19 cm x 9 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
